name: dev-team
description: Hybrid preset for software development teams where executives are also developers. Combines the most useful types from both specialized presets.

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.extraction_hint: People mentioned by name with a role or responsibility

entity_types.name: Decision
entity_types.extraction_hint: Explicit decisions with rationale or consequences
examples: We decided to use PostgreSQL for persistence
The team chose React over Vue

entity_types.name: Meeting
entity_types.extraction_hint: Scheduled meetings with outcomes or action items

entity_types.name: Bug
examples: The login timeout bug is P1
Memory leak in the worker process

entity_types.name: Pattern
entity_types.extraction_hint: Recurring patterns, anti-patterns, or best practices
examples: Circuit breaker pattern for external calls

entity_types.name: Topic
entity_types.extraction_hint: Abstract topics, themes, or areas of discussion
examples: We need to discuss technical debt

entity_types.name: Fact
entity_types.extraction_hint: Versioned knowledge claims that may be superseded over time
examples: Sarah is the CTO as of March 2026
